world.title: Lithuania, Latvia bar Slovak prime minister from using airspace for travel to Moscow
world.description: Lithuania and Latvia will not let Slovak Prime Minister Robert Fico use their airspace to travel to Moscow for Russia's Victory Day celebrations in May, he said April 18.

business.title: ePlus’ AI-Era Memory Reclamation Push Might Change The Case For Investing In ePlus (PLUS)
business.description:
Earlier in April 2026, ePlus announced a Memory Optimization and Reclamation Assessment aimed at helping enterprises reclaim underused memory capacity amid severe AI-driven memory chip shortages and supply chain constraints identified by Gartner.
By focusing on uncovering “zombie” and stranded memory and providing an optimization roadmap with cost-avoidance insights, ePlus is positioning itself as a practical partner for customers struggling to secure or afford new memory hardware.

business.title: APA Production Cut Links Waha Gas Prices To Valuation Opportunity
business.description:
APA Corporation curtailed a significant amount of U.S. natural gas and NGL production in Q1 2026.
The decision was driven by unfavorable Waha hub pricing for natural gas.
The move reflects an operational adjustment that could affect revenue and production guidance.
For investors, this production cut comes with APA shares at $35.74, after a 40.9% gain year to date and a 133.3% return over the past year. Those figures sit alongside weaker recent trading, with a 7.5% decline over the past week...

business.title: ESCO Technologies Megger Deal Expands Grid Reliability And Earnings Story
business.description:
ESCO Technologies (NYSE:ESE) announced the acquisition and planned merger of Megger Group, a global provider of electrical testing and utility solutions.
The combination brings together two established players in grid reliability, predictive maintenance, and utility diagnostics.
The deal is structured to broaden ESCO's portfolio, with a focus on operational resilience and expanded service capabilities for utilities worldwide.

business.title: American Airlines Rebuffs United Merger And Doubles Down On Standalone Plan
business.description:
American Airlines Group, NasdaqGS:AAL, has publicly rejected the idea of a merger with United Airlines.
The company cited antitrust and competition concerns, emphasizing potential impacts on consumers.
Management reiterated a focus on pursuing its own independent plans rather than large scale airline consolidation.

ai.title: Regina residents rally against proposed AI data centre before RM of Sherwood council vote
ai.description: Nearly 200 people gathered at the legislature in Regina Saturday to protest the lack of consultation around Bell Canada's planned AI data centre, set to be built in Sherwood. The rural municipality's council is set to vote on the AI centre's development agreement on Monday.
